name: Generic Overview
description: Numeric KPI cards, date-range/activity KPIs, a multi-series trend line, category breakdowns by value, and record-count-by-category charts. Matches any connected dataset with at least one numeric column.

name: Dates & Categories Overview
description: Fallback for datasets with no genuine numeric measure — date-range/activity KPIs and record-count-by-category charts only. Requires no numeric column, so it always matches after Generic Overview's requirement isn't met.
